prose: The frontier-orbitals calculation on furan was performed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set in the gas phase. The calculation converged with SCF cycles and produced a HOMO energy of approximately -6.36 eV and a LUMO energy of approximately -0.10 eV, resulting in a HOMO-LUMO gap of approximately 6.26 eV. The orbitals are provided in the output, along with Koopmans' analysis and convergence details.
